title: Senior Doctor - Columbia Asia - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Columbia Asia - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Columbia Asia has an exciting opening for a Senior Doctor at our Noida office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Columbia Asia:
Columbia Asia is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Clinical Research

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Columbia Asia!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
